response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB at Optilyz and re:cinq. Current role explicitly includes AI agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows), directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent), TDD/craftsmanship orientation, cloud (AWS CDK) and Docker/Kubernetes exposure, plus community teaching experience signal a strong senior IC fit.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience plus current AI agent and MCP tooling work
Polyglot engineer with Java, DLang, C++ and strong testing/TDD craftsmanship background
Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, and CI/CD trunk-based delivery experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed (Jest/testing background likely transfers)
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (robotic arms, mobile orchestration)
MIT BS dates overlap heavily with concurrent full-time roles in Europe — worth verifying
